content:
Sabol Hill Lacuna v1.0.0 is a professional audio effects plugin for Windows that combines multiband saturation, stereo enhancement, and EQ processing into a single workflow. Built around Sabol Hill's proprietary CURRENT technology, it introduces subtle, constantly evolving spectral movement to emulate the depth, width, and character often associated with analog hardware while retaining the flexibility of a digital plugin. It supports modern plugin formats for use in popular DAWs.

Key Features

• Advanced CURRENT dual-mono spectral drift technology

• Independent control for each frequency band

• TAPE, TUBE, and TRANS saturation engines

• Four-band harmonic shaping architecture

• INFRA, TERRA, and SUPRA tone profiles

• DRIFT stereo width enhancement

• LEAN channel bias control

• Adjustable 4-band crossover system

DOWNLOAD SETUP
